subtasks.description: Query TPC-H database to identify top 10 customers by lifetime value in BUILDING market segment. Return customer ID, name, total lifetime value, order count, and order value statistics (min, max, avg) to support narrative generation.

For each of the top 10 BUILDING segment customers, reconcile their order history patterns (frequency, recency, value trends) with customer lifetime value metrics. Generate a personalized retention narrative for each customer that references their specific order behavior (e.g., spending trends, order frequency, seasonal patterns) and positions them as high-value strategic accounts.

plan.cost_rationale: Two subtasks: (1) sql_gen at mid tier to handle multi-table joins across customer, orders, and line items with aggregation and filtering by market segment; (2) cross_recon at mid tier to synthesize the customer metrics into personalized narratives that reference order patterns—this is a reconciliation and synthesis task that combines quantitative data into qualitative, customer-specific insights. No separate policy_action or multitool_plan needed as the query does not ask for policy evaluation or multi-tool orchestration. The cross_recon agent handles the narrative generation as part of its reconciliation and classification scope."

output.sql: SELECT c.c_custkey, c.c_name, ROUND(SUM(o.o_totalprice)::NUMERIC, 2) AS lifetime_value, COUNT(o.o_orderkey) AS order_count, ROUND(MIN(o.o_totalprice)::NUMERIC, 2) AS min_order_value, ROUND(MAX(o.o_totalprice)::NUMERIC, 2) AS max_order_value, ROUND(AVG(o.o_totalprice)::NUMERIC, 2) AS avg_order_value FROM customer c INNER JOIN orders o ON c.c_custkey = o.o_custkey WHERE c.c_mktsegment = 'BUILDING' GROUP BY c.c_custkey, c.c_name ORDER BY lifetime_value DESC LIMIT 10
